image:image.image:title: Document Localizer - AI PDF and Markdown Translator
image:image.image:caption: AI-powered offline document localization for 100+ locales

image:image.image:title: Upload PDF or Markdown files
image:image.image:caption: Select source and target locales for localization

image:image.image:title: Review translations in side-by-side diff view
image:image.image:caption: Paragraph-level approve or reject before export

image:image.image:title: Export approved documents
image:image.image:caption: Export localized documents as Markdown or PDF
